case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. ONIEDA ALODAGA VALDEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALDEZ, ONIEDA ALODAGA $1,420.16 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,580.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $65.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, ONIEDA ALODAGA
